gold_change_reason: Modified to handle extra whitespace/blank lines in m/z input and edge cases in adducts parameter (empty, leading/trailing commas, repeated).
covered_requirements: Add extra whitespace and blank lines to the m/z input string to test robustness of parsing.
Add edge cases for adducts parameter: empty string, leading/trailing commas, and repeated adducts.
implementation_notes: The function now cleans the m/z string by stripping whitespace and ignoring blank lines.
The adducts string is cleaned by removing empty entries before sending to the API.
assumptions: The LipidMaps API remains accessible and returns the same results as in the seed case.
The API can handle an empty adducts string (though not tested).
